statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); session=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id' | cut -c1-8); transcript_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path'); context_size="N/A"; if [ -f "$transcript_path" ] && [ -r "$transcript_path" ]; then context_size=$(wc -c < "$transcript_path" 2>/dev/null | awk '{if($1>=1048576) printf "%.1fM", $1/1048576; else if($1>=1024) printf "%.1fK", $1/1024; else printf "%d", $1}'); fi; git_info=""; if [ -d "$cwd/.git" ]; then git_branch=$(cd "$cwd" && git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "detached"); git_status=$(cd "$cwd" && git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); git_info=" • $(printf "\033[36m")⎇ $git_branch$(printf "\033[0m")$([ "$git_status" -gt 0 ] && printf " $(printf "\033[33m")[$git_status]$(printf "\033[0m")")" || true; fi; printf "$(printf "\033[32m")◉ $model$(printf "\033[0m") $(printf "\033[90m")[$session]$(printf "\033[0m") $(printf "\033[35m")⌘ $context_size$(printf "\033[0m")$git_info • $(printf "\033[34m")$(basename "$cwd")$(printf "\033[0m")"
